description_long: This is a stylized representation of a flamingo, characterized by its long, slender neck and legs, and a large, rounded body. The bird's plumage is predominantly pink, with a subtle gradient from a lighter pink on the head and neck to a slightly deeper pink on the body and tail. Its beak is large, thick, and distinctly curved downward, colored yellow at the base and black at the tip. The flamingo stands on one leg, with the other leg bent and tucked up against its body, a typical posture for this species. The legs and feet are a vivid orange-red, and the eyes are small and round, set high on the head. The overall form is smooth and simplified, with minimal feather detailing and a glossy finish.
description: A stylized pink flamingo with a curved yellow-and-black beak, standing on one orange-red leg with a smooth, glossy surface.
description_view_0: Side view of the flamingo with its head facing left, showing the full curve of the neck and the tucked-up leg.
description_view_1: Opposite side view with the head facing right, highlighting the rounded body and the bent leg more prominently.
description_view_2: Three-quarter rear view, showing the tail and the curvature of the back, with the beak and legs partially visible.
description_view_3: Rear side view with the head turned, emphasizing the tail and the slenderness of the standing leg.
attribute_plumage_pattern: solid pink with subtle gradient, no distinct markings
